register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Create your account and then set up your climbing gym or club.
register.successMessage: Your account has been successfully created. You can now set up your organization.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
register.errorMessage: An error occurred while creating the account.

register.title: Set Up Organization
register.subtitle: Set up your climbing gym or club on the Beta Battle platform.
register.name: Organization Name
register.slugHint: Used in URLs. Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
register.successMessage: Your organization has been successfully registered.
register.errorMessage: An error occurred while creating the organization.
